summary: Fringe benefit optimization and ICHRA compliance platform for government contractors.
editor_note: Someone finally treated fringe benefits for federal contractors as an operating system, not a broker spreadsheet. CVRD models SCA/DBRA obligations, tracks H&W dollars in real time, manages ICHRAs, and shows an Aptive case with $536,870 annual savings across 151 enrolled employees. Unlike generic benefits software, the bet is owning the narrow compliance math where margins leak. The risk is whether service-heavy advocacy scales beyond early GovCon accounts.
